structured_payload_candidate.title: Chiller Plant Alarms - Sensor Failure
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Chilled water plant sensors
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate Level 3 alarm for monitoring-only sensor failure, Level 2 for control sensor failure. Failure criteria: feedback < 2 mA from 4-20 mA transducer or temperature reading < 0°F.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Sensor feedback < 2 mA or temperature < 0°F.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 3 alarm (monitoring) or Level 2 alarm (control).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Sensor Failure: a. Sensor shall be deemed outside of its widest possible operating range if any of the following are true: 1. Feedback less than 2 mA from any 4 to 20 mA transducer; or 2. Temperature reading less than 0°F from any temperature sensor. b. Any sensor that goes outside of its widest possible operating range. 1. If the sensor is used for monitoring only: Level 3. 2. If the sensor is used for control: Level 2.
